{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144628C041C98552F3A8170FC4"}"},"total":302},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597880426279928638","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"想不到这竟然只是作者的第二篇文，太优秀了。史料翔实有根据，描写传神真实，文笔自然幽默，没什么金手指也没有cp，角色一步步发展既符合当时社会情况又让人充满期待，番茄里少见的好文，绝对能得9分以上"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769022369,"group_id":"7547333813144144921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6wtZVkeSxPjz+Bk/19+G1vKOCQsB6fHEP+BSar5KLWs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2909767123604201","user_name":"喜欢蓼属的路母"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2909767123604201","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547333813144144921","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚开，会慢慢涨）开局春秋底层视角+无cp+日常+种田+基建。
注：争霸内容比较靠后，起码六十万字以后，剧情如果脱缰，也可能百万字以后才开始……
女主大力王+手搓达人。
  姜禾穿了，但周边家人邻里都无法说清如今是何朝代，故一直心有疑问。
   半年后。
　 邻村有位娴静时如娇花照月，行动处似弱柳扶风的大美人，美名都传到邻国去了。
　　“那日我见她在溪中浣纱，哎呦，鱼儿见了她，都羞的沉进水底。”这不，两位邻人打姜禾身旁经过，闲聊时的话语随风落入耳中，讨论的正是那位美人。
　　咦？浣纱沉鱼，这典故很熟悉啊，那不是西施么？姜禾如此想。

　　就在她站定皱眉沉思时，恰好胸口有点莫名发痒，便伸手隔衣抓了抓，沉思入神，抓完忘记把手放下。
　　另一同样路过的长舌邻人眼神无意间掠过姜禾，见她皱眉捂胸做捧心状，不由大声嗤笑：“西村美人都称西施，你这效颦的改名为东施吧，东施效颦，丑不可观！”
　　姜禾风中凌乱……
　　等等，你是说，我就是那被群嘲几千年的东施？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a67eb9318888fc6b8d138847f3c6b713","author":"炮灰没有回忆","author_id":"","book_id":"7547333813144144921","book_name":"穿了，但穿成大笑话了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7547333859390521881","read_count":"17895","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"408137"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"189","tags":"种田,古代言情,今穿古,乡村,基建,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/70830700e0434f845983feebeba30c2c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259588&x-signature=V9Ve68i6eKrYGx1IlEwXtnRDqZQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2550496771974222","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"106"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144628C041C98552F3A8170FC4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":149,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9548,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4644},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7612194586186941246","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看超级好看，之前评论我还是夸的太保守了，这次攒了差不多一百章一口气追完，爽爽的，炮灰老师这知识面是真的广，文笔也好，有种春风拂面的感觉。这个题材我最近找了几个平台，同时凑齐这么多要素的真没有平替的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772354763,"group_id":"7547333813144144921","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3421297086313069"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547333813144144921","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"147"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":52354,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54383,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7592207630254981950","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，看到最新章58章了，目前无雷，用词舒适
我是看了那条说有说教感的评论进来，抱着倒是要看看作者是怎么说教的想法看的。
事实上并没有，至少我觉得没有，作者只是写出真实的女性处境而已。对想看女性友好、i女文的读者来说完全是同频共振了。
如果这都觉得是说教的话可以确定是跟作者对不上脑回路了，不必勉强自己看
因为可能平时刷到有关新wen都要说“我上网不是为了看这些的”，一划过去世界又“平静”了
再说一下剧情，比较落地，画面感很强；主角设定挺喜欢的，高高壮壮又大力，在这种陌生环境非常有安全感，母亲姐姐们也不错，主角做事的时候都能帮上忙，父亲是个普通的古代男人。有的家庭里，成员之间也是会争夺话语权的，不想被一方压榨那就夺取话语权后排挤他让他变成边缘人，这样真的到事情来临时才不会被他唱反调拖后腿。
很喜欢主角家这种一起将生活经营好的氛围，一同努力比一个人托举一个糟糕的家庭好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767702035,"group_id":"7547333813144144921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0AMtXuPO+gL0FDZVtyHh8al6clePaaInlVaKEqajzm4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8978e67f17094466bb25475abc1f8cba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618565&x-signature=2k2jS3vETLQ7AUt6OZ7%2BOrungjQ%3D","user_id":"3421297086313069","user_name":"女频的尽头是女本位"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3421297086313069","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547333813144144921","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚开，会慢慢涨）开局春秋底层视角+无cp+日常+种田+基建。
